properties.name: AutoSaveEnabled
properties.summary: Enables or disables Rhino's automatic file saving mechanism.

properties.name: AutoSaveInterval
properties.summary: How often the document will be saved when Rhino's automatic file saving mechanism is enabled.

properties.name: AutoSaveMeshes
properties.summary: Saves render and display meshes in autosave file.

properties.name: ClipboardCopyToPreviousRhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that decides if copies to the clipboard are performed in both the current and previous Rhino clipboard formats. This means you will double the size of what is saved in the clipboard but will be able to copy from the current to the previous version using the clipboard.

properties.name: ClipboardOnExit
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines what to do with clipboard data on exit.

properties.name: CreateBackupFiles
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to create backup files.

properties.name: FileLockingEnabled
properties.summary: Ensures that only one person at a time can have a file open for saving.

properties.name: FileLockingOpenWarning
properties.summary: Displays an information dialog which identifies computer file is open on.

properties.name: SaveViewChanges
properties.summary: true for users who consider view changes a document change.
